allowed_exemptions.runtime/governance/legacy_archives/claud: legacy archive; not live governance execution

blocking_patterns: direct open(..., append mode) outside canonical writer/compat/validator internals and non-live legacy exemptions
hash_chain_preservation_rule: Hash-chain callers must preserve prior/hash fields and append through the governed writer/compat layer.
scope: live governance plus test/eval append-stream harnesses before full export
verdict_rule: PASS only when no blocking append-open call sites remain across live governance and test/eval harnesses.
